trending_videos.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
trending_videos.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Iowa vs. Florida
trending_videos.description: Iowa faces Florida in the South Region second round at Benchmark International Arena. After a hard-fought battle with the Tigers, Iowa meets the Gators. Florida beat Prairie View 114-55 to qualify. Both teams aim for the tournament's next round.

trending_videos.title: Dutton Ranch | Official Teaser | Paramount+
trending_videos.description:
Rip Wheeler and Beth Dutton gamble everything on a new life in South Texas, but the promise of building a future far from the ghosts of Yellowstone quickly collides with brutal new realities and a rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire.

Dutton Ranch. Streaming May 15. Only on Paramount+.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: UCLA vs. UConn
trending_videos.description: The East Region round two gets underway as UCLA takes on UConn at Xfinity Mobile Arena. The Bruins beat the Knights 75-71 to qualify, while the Huskies beat Furman 82-71. Both teams look to qualify for the next round in this high-stakes matchup.

trending_videos.title: JUJUTSU KAISEN Sendai Colony | Official Trailer | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
Watch JUJUTSU KAISEN on Crunchyroll! http://got.cr/cc-jjkpv

ABOUT JUJUTSU KAISEN
Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. Guided by the most powerful of sorcerers, Satoru Gojo, Itadori is admitted to Tokyo Jujutsu High School, an organization that fights the curses... and thus begins the heroic tale of a boy who became a curse to exorcise a curse, a life from which he could never turn back.

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

▶ WATCH FULL ANIME EPISODES ON YOUTUBE: https://got.cr/cc-pt

🔶 GET YOUR FREE 7-DAY CRUNCHYROLL TRIAL: https://got.cr/cc-7dayspv

diverse_content.description: The trending videos encompass a wide range of genres including movie trailers, sports highlights, music videos, and television show teasers.
insights: Trailers and teasers are popular, indicating a strong interest in upcoming media releases.
Sports content related to specific events is trending, likely due to current live tournaments.
Music videos, particularly those featuring well-known artists, continue to attract significant viewership.

emerging_genres.description: There is an increasing trend in anime-related content, as seen with the JUJUTSU KAISEN trailer.
insights: Anime continues to grow in popularity globally, with dedicated platforms like Crunchyroll driving engagement.
There is an opportunity for content creators to capitalize on anime’s growing fanbase with timely releases and collaborations.

established_channels.description: Top channels like Disney, TBS, and Paramount Plus are consistently able to achieve trending status.
insights: Well-known brands have a strong influence on trending patterns, often leveraging their existing audience base.
Collaborations or partnerships with these channels may offer exposure opportunities for smaller creators.

music_collaborations.description: Music videos featuring collaborations between multiple artists are prevalent among trending content.
insights: Collaborative music projects increase reach and viewership by combining fanbases of different artists.
Creators can explore cross-genre collaborations to tap into varied audience segments.

cross-platform synergy.description: Streaming services and television networks are using YouTube as a promotional platform.
insights: Content creators can explore partnerships with streaming services to produce exclusive behind-the-scenes content.
There is potential for creating companion content for popular shows to capture interested audiences.

sports content.description: Sports content related to ongoing events is trending, indicating high viewer interest.
insights: Creating highlights, analysis, or fan-focused content around major sporting events can attract viewers.
Niche sports content may find a dedicated audience, especially during major tournaments.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
